title: Meliha Aksu
content:
Meliha Aksu

Instructor

VSHS / Dialysis - Head of Program

meliha.aksu

uskudar.edu.tr

Higher Education Council Formatted CV

Rate Us

Short CV

She was born in Istanbul in 1984. She graduated from the nursing department, İstanbul University in 2006. Between the years 2006-2013, she worked as a dialysis nurse at The Turkish Kidney Foundation in İstanbul. She published articles  in the National Kidney Disease, Dialysis and Transplantation Nursing Congress in 2010-2015. She received her MSc degree in Hospital & Health Care Management Department from Beykent University in Istanbul 2012.

She still works in Uskudar University as a lecturer.
